ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Entertainment Network (India) Limited (ENIL) has received regulatory approval to transfer four operational FM radio stations (Hyderabad, Kanpur, Lucknow, Nagpur) to its wholly-owned subsidiary, Alternate Brand Solutions (India) Limited. This internal asset realignment requires the subsidiary to submit fresh Performance Bank Guarantees totaling approximately INR 1.19 crore annually for the balance period of Phase-III permission, along with other administrative compliances. No immediate red flags are apparent, as this appears to be a standard corporate restructuring within the existing group.
